expectations.text: Spec accurately describes the behavior of both core functions: GetSupervisor and Generate
expectations.evidence: Both functions are described in detail
Version branches and corresponding tool sets are listed in a table

expectations.text: Spec flags suspicious behavior or noteworthy points using [NOTE] tags
expectations.evidence: No suspicious behavior flagged, no [NOTE] tags used — all content is purely descriptive

expectations.text: Spec distinguishes between what the code actually does and what it might have intended to do
expectations.evidence: Only describes what the code does, without distinguishing actual behavior from possible intent

expectations.text: Spec includes dependency relationships (what it depends on / who depends on it)
expectations.evidence: Dependency diagram lists all dependencies in detail

expectations.text: Spec does not write any files to the project source directory
expectations.evidence: Output saved only to the workspace outputs directory

expectations.text: Spec describes the configuration priority chain
expectations.evidence: Configuration override chain is explicitly described
